name: beas
description: Béas — dev orchestration (Postgres + 5 Go services + Next.js) in one command.

scripts.predev: docker compose down && docker compose up -d postgres
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n translit,auth,wiki,quiz,gateway,web -c magenta,blue,green,yellow,cyan,white "cd backend && go run github.com/air-verse/air@v1.62.0 -c .air/translit.toml" "cd backend && go run github.com/air-verse/air@v1.62.0 -c .air/auth.toml" "cd backend && go run github.com/air-verse/air@v1.62.0 -c .air/wiki.toml" "cd backend && go run github.com/air-verse/air@v1.62.0 -c .air/quiz.toml" "cd backend && go run github.com/air-verse/air@v1.62.0 -c .air/gateway.toml" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
